Project notes:
- Project type: Vite React TypeScript application.
- Scope: starter shell for a map-based browser game using an unlabeled world map.
- Installed extensions: none required.
- Build validation: use `npm run build`.
- Launch guidance: use `npm run dev` when ready to start the local server.
